name: paper-review
description: Multi-role academic peer review with expert cross-review and venue-ready review fields.

interface.shortDescription: Generate rigorous academic peer reviews from multiple expert perspectives.
interface.longDescription: Paper Review coordinates a structured multi-role review process for academic manuscripts, then formats findings into venue-ready review fields with a secondary review-quality audit.
defaultPrompt: Review this paper like an expert reviewer.
Audit this review for weak reasoning.
